project_summary: Digital wallet for SME payments with onboarding, compliance review, and card funding flows.

components.name: OAuth and JWT authentication service
components.description: Build a secure authentication backend for wallet users and operations staff. The service issues short-lived JWTs, supports refresh tokens, and integrates OAuth providers for business identity verification.

components.name: Wallet transaction ledger
components.description: Create double-entry ledger tables and APIs for deposits, card funding, and peer transfers. The component validates idempotency keys and records immutable accounting movements.

project_summary: Loan origination portal for retail banking with document capture, risk scoring, and advisor dashboards.

components.name: Credit risk rule engine
components.description: Configure deterministic scoring rules for income bands, debt ratios, and employment history. The module produces explainable decisions for bank advisors and stores rule execution traces.

components.name: Advisor review dashboard
components.description: Deliver a dashboard where advisors review applications, request missing documents, and override rule outcomes with mandatory justification. Queues are prioritized by SLA and risk score.

project_summary: Treasury reconciliation platform for matching bank statements against ERP invoices and payouts.

components.name: Bank statement importer
components.description: Ingest daily bank files in CSV and MT940 formats. The importer normalizes currency, reference fields, and posting dates before storing transactions for reconciliation.

components.name: Invoice matching engine
components.description: Match incoming statement lines with open invoices and payout records using deterministic rules plus confidence scoring. Finance teams can review uncertain matches and approve corrections.

project_summary: Marketplace modernization for catalog search, promotions, checkout, and seller inventory synchronization.

components.name: Product catalog search
components.description: Build a searchable product catalog with filters for brand, category, availability, and price. The feature synchronizes seller updates and exposes fast query responses for storefront pages.

components.name: Responsive checkout
components.description: Create a multi-step checkout experience optimized for mobile buyers. The flow includes shipping options, payment selection, order review, and abandoned cart resilience.

project_summary: Direct-to-consumer store for sustainable home goods with subscriptions and warehouse integration.

components.name: Subscription plan management
components.description: Let customers subscribe to recurring home goods bundles and modify delivery cadence. The backend handles plan changes, billing retries, and paused subscriptions.

components.name: Warehouse stock sync
components.description: Synchronize inventory levels between the storefront and the third-party warehouse system. The integration processes stock reservations, shipping confirmations, and backorder updates.

project_summary: Online store for cycling equipment with same-day delivery scheduling and returns management.

components.name: Same-day delivery scheduler
components.description: Provide delivery windows based on courier capacity, buyer location, and warehouse cutoff times. The scheduler avoids overbooking and updates the order timeline in real time.

components.name: Returns self-service portal
components.description: Allow customers to request returns, select pickup times, and print labels. Support agents can inspect return reasons and approve exceptions from the admin panel.

project_summary: Fashion retail platform with personalized recommendations and seasonal campaign landing pages.

components.name: Personalized recommendations
components.description: Recommend products based on browsing behavior, purchase history, and campaign priorities. The service exposes recommendation slots for home, product detail, and cart pages.

components.name: Campaign landing page builder
components.description: Give marketing teams reusable sections for seasonal landing pages. Editors compose product grids, editorial banners, and call-to-action blocks without code changes.

project_summary: Patient portal for appointments, lab results, consent forms, and secure messaging with care teams.

components.name: Appointment booking
components.description: Allow patients to search providers, select time slots, and reschedule appointments with clinic policy constraints. The module syncs availability with the internal scheduling system.

components.name: Secure patient messaging
components.description: Enable encrypted messages between patients and assigned care teams. The feature includes triage labels, response SLAs, and notification preferences.

project_summary: Remote patient monitoring dashboard for chronic care programs and connected medical devices.

components.name: Medical device ingestion
components.description: Receive readings from Bluetooth gateways and vendor APIs for blood pressure, glucose, and pulse oximetry devices. The service validates units, timestamps, and patient-device assignments.

components.name: Clinical alert rules
components.description: Generate alerts when readings exceed personalized thresholds or when devices stop reporting. Nurses can acknowledge alerts, add notes, and escalate cases to physicians.

project_summary: Analytics warehouse for hospital operations, bed occupancy, staffing, and discharge predictions.

components.name: Hospital ETL pipeline
components.description: Extract operational data from admission, discharge, and staffing systems. The pipeline standardizes facility codes, timestamps, and patient encounter identifiers.

components.name: Operations BI dashboards
components.description: Build dashboards for executives and hospital managers. Visualizations summarize occupancy pressure, discharge delays, staffing gaps, and weekly operational KPIs.

project_summary: Pharmacy fulfillment system for prescriptions, insurance validation, inventory, and delivery dispatch.

components.name: Prescription intake
components.description: Capture prescriptions from partner clinics and customer uploads. Pharmacists validate dosage, medication availability, and prescription authenticity before fulfillment.

components.name: Insurance eligibility check
components.description: Integrate with insurer APIs to verify coverage, copay amounts, and prior authorization requirements. Failed checks are routed to a manual resolution queue.

project_summary: Manufacturing execution dashboard for production lines, machine telemetry, downtime analysis, and maintenance planning.

components.name: Machine telemetry gateway
components.description: Collect sensor readings from PLCs and normalize machine status events. The gateway buffers readings during connectivity gaps and publishes clean telemetry to the platform.

components.name: Maintenance planner
components.description: Schedule preventive maintenance based on operating hours and alert history. The planner coordinates technician assignments, spare parts, and production blackout windows.

project_summary: Port logistics control tower for container tracking, berth planning, customs milestones, and truck appointments.

components.name: Container tracking API
components.description: Track container status from vessel arrival through gate-out events. The API merges terminal updates, customs milestones, and carrier references into a single timeline.

components.name: Berth planning board
components.description: Create an operational board for berth assignments, vessel ETAs, and crane capacity. Planners can simulate schedule changes before publishing updates.

project_summary: IoT platform for agricultural equipment monitoring, field alerts, and fleet utilization reporting.

components.name: IoT device registry
components.description: Register tractors, sensors, and gateway devices with ownership and calibration metadata. The registry supports secure provisioning and field replacement workflows.

components.name: Field alert processing
components.description: Process incoming moisture, temperature, and equipment fault readings. Alerts are routed to field managers with severity, location, and recommended action.

project_summary: Energy operations platform for wind farm monitoring, incident management, and regulatory reporting.

components.name: SCADA data adapter
components.description: Integrate turbine telemetry from the SCADA system and transform vendor-specific tags into a common data model. The adapter flags missing readings and stores quality indicators.

components.name: Regulatory reporting exports
components.description: Produce monthly availability, generation, and incident reports required by regulators. Reports include validation summaries and signed export archives.
